Description: Move accepted photos, rejected photos, and non-photo artifacts into the correct managed folders without deleting anything.

Stories.StoryDescription: Create dayXX, rejected, and not_photo folders lazily when they are needed.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Required managed folders are created automatically during file moves.

Stories.StoryDescription: Move videos, sidecars, and unsupported files into the correct dayXX/not_photo folder.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Non-photo artifacts are moved into dayXX/not_photo for their assigned day.

Stories.StoryDescription: Move rejected photo candidates into dayXX/rejected for their assigned day.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Rejected photos are moved into dayXX/rejected without being deleted.

Stories.StoryDescription: Move accepted photos into the root of their assigned dayXX folder.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Accepted photos are moved into the correct dayXX folder.

Stories.StoryDescription: Avoid silent overwrites by generating a deterministic duplicate suffix when destination names collide.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: File moves never overwrite an existing file silently and produce a safe duplicate name when needed.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add unit tests covering folder creation, destination placement, and collision-safe moves.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover folder creation and collision-safe move behavior.
